_README: Keys are lowercase substrings matched against the device's parent-app name. 'conn' must be one of: paired, lan_direct, lan_bridge, cloud, virtual, hubmesh, other. 'name' is the display name shown in reports. Either field is optional. This file is merged over the built-in bridge defaults (Philips Hue, Lutron, Bond). Upload to File Manager as hub_diagnostics_integration_overrides.json, then save the Hub Diagnostics settings page to apply.
